headline: Regulator wants additional, detailed information on UP-NS rail merger
summary: The Surface Transportation Board is asking Union Pacific and Norfolk Southern for more detailed information related to their transcontinental rail merger. The post Regulator wants additional, detailed information on UP-NS rail merger appeared first on FreightWaves.
